batch_1:
# Batch 1: Ballymore Jumper Lift + Mudmat Analysis

**Source**: `engineering_workbooks/ballymore/` (10 workbooks)
**Machine**: ws014 (Windows)
**Estimated**: ~4.5M tokens | **Medium-High complexity**

## Workbooks

| # | File | Sheets | Domain | Target Module |
|---|------|--------|--------|---------------|
| 1.1 | `jumper_manifold_to_plet/Jumper_Input_Ballymore_Manifold-PLET V2.xlsx` | 7 | Jumper geometry, pipe properties, buoyancy, strake, rigging, crane UC, weight tally | `digitalmodel/install/jumper_lift.py` |
| 1.2 | `jumper_plet_to_plem/SZ_Ballymore_Jumper_MF.xlsm` (12MB) | TBD | SZ jumper model with AHC offsets | `digitalmodel/install/jumper_aht.py` |
| 1.3 | `jumper_plet_to_plem/Jumper_DZ_AHCoff.xlsm` | TBD | DZ jumper model with AHC offsets | `digitalmodel/install/jumper_aht.py` |
| 1.4 | `sut_mm/VA_mudmat.xlsm` | TBD | Manifold mudmat design tool | `digitalmodel/install/mudmat.py` |
| 1.5 | `sut_mm/GOM-ANA-TOOL-0002_02-PreCodeModified_PostCorrect.xlsm` | TBD | Structural analysis tool | `digitalmodel/install/mudmat.py` |
| 1.6 | `sut_mm/01-SZ-Xdeg/GOM-ANA-TOOL-0002_02-PreCodeModified_PostCorrect_VA.xlsm` | TBD | Structural analysis variant | `digitalmodel/install/mudmat.py` |
| 1.7 | `sut_mm/SUT_mudmat_dimensions.xlsx` | TBD | Mudmat dimensions | `digitalmodel/install/mudmat.py` |
| 1.8 | `sut_mm/mudmat_tool/GOM-IAN-TOOL-001_02-SUT-MM.xlsm` | TBD | Mudmat tool with macros | `digitalmodel/install/mudmat.py` |
| 1.9 | `sut_mm/04-RES/00deg/ResonanceCheck.xlsx` | TBD | Resonance check analysis | `digitalmodel/install/resonance.py` |
| 1.10 | `sut_mm/04-RES/30deg/ResonanceCheck.xlsx` | TBD | Resonance check (30deg) | `digitalmodel/install/resonance.py` |

## Conversion Notes

- #1.1 is the easiest entry point: 7 sheets already fully analyzed, no VBA, clear cross-sheet references
- 1.2 and 1.3 are xlsm (macros) — check if macros are essential or just for formatting
- ResonanceCheck sheets (1.9, 1.10) are likely simple natural frequency calcs

## Deliverables

For each workbook converted:
- [ ] Python module with openpyxl I/O, type hints, docstrings
- [ ] Test suite verifying outputs match spreadsheet values
- [ ] README note on calculation methodology
- [ ] PR to `digitalmodel/` or appropriate repo
batch_2:
# Batch 2: FDAS Riser Engineering

**Source**: `engineering_workbooks/0163-FDAS/` (already tracked) + `engineering_workbooks/references/`
**Machine**: ws014 (Windows)
**Estimated**: ~8.5M tokens | **High complexity**

## Workbooks

| # | Path | Domain | Target Module |
|---|------|--------|---------------|
| 2.1 | `0163-FDAS/FDAS/Engineering/risers/stroke/20160730 Riser Stroke-Stretch v WSirius Heave.xlsx` | Riser stroke/stretch vs vessel heave | `digitalmodel/riser/stroke_stretch.py` |
| 2.2 | `0163-FDAS/FDAS/Engineering/risers/Riser Sizing and Top Tension*.xlsx` (3 copies) | Riser sizing/TT envelope | `digitalmodel/riser/sizing.py` |
| 2.3 | `0163-FDAS/FDAS/Engineering/risers/assembly/Rev20/` (14 component models) | Drilling riser assembly geometry | `digitalmodel/riser/assembly/` |
| 2.4 | `0163-FDAS/FDAS/Engineering/ace/LoadRAO/0127/` (RAO + riser analysis calcs) | Load case RAO processing | `digitalmodel/riser/load_rao.py` |
| 2.5 | `0163-FDAS/FDAS/Engineering/Calculation Spreadsheets/` (pipe burst, MASP, kill calcs, casing) | Casing/drilling pressure ratings | `digitalmodel/casing/pressure_rating.py` |

## Deliverables

For each workbook converted:
- [ ] Python module with openpyxl I/O, type hints, docstrings
- [ ] Test suite verifying outputs match spreadsheet values
- [ ] README note on calculation methodology
- [ ] PR to `digitalmodel/` or appropriate repo

| 4.1 | `SCR_design_DNV_F201/Spreadsheets/Catenary.xlsm` | SCR catenary geometry | `digitalmodel/pipeline/scr_catenary.py` |

| 4.10 | `pipeline_design_workshop/.../Exercise - WTD.xlsx` | Pipeline design workshop exercise | `digitalmodel/pipeline/wall_thickness.py` |

- [ ] PR to `digitalmodel/` or appropriate repo

# Batch 5: Talos Venice Umbilical Installation

| 5.1 | `infield/1.ini/` (initiation) | 5 | 1st end initiation static analysis | `digitalmodel/umbilical/initiation.py` |
| 5.2 | `infield/3.NL/` (natural laydown) | 7 | NL static summaries, iteration results | `digitalmodel/umbilical/natural_laydown.py` |
| 5.3 | `infield/5.ld/` (laydown) | 4 | 2nd end laydown static | `digitalmodel/umbilical/laydown.py` |

| 5.8 | `infield/7.2ndDeckhandling/` | 1 | 2nd end deck handling | `digitalmodel/umbilical/2nd_end_deck.py` |
